topics: Introduction to Fuzzy Set Theory - Uncertainty, Imprecision and Vagueness, Crisp vs Fuzzy Sets, Representation of Fuzzy Sets
Membership Functions - Types and Basic Operations (Dilation, Concentration, Normalization), Linguistic Hedges
Properties of Fuzzy Sets - Level Sets, Alpha Cut Representation
Operations on Fuzzy Sets - Complement, Intersection, Union, Aggregation Operations
Fuzzy Relations - Operations: Union, Intersection, Complement, Cartesian Product
Extension Principle - Fuzzy Arithmetic, Fuzzy Numbers, Arithmetic Operations on Fuzzy Numbers
Fuzzy Reasoning - Generalized Modus Ponens (GMP) and Generalized Modus Tollens (GMT)
Fuzzy Inference - Zadeh Rule, Mamdani Rule
Development of Membership Functions - Intuition, Inference, Rank Ordering, Inductive Reasoning
Defuzzification to Scalars - Max Membership Principle, Centroid Method, Weighted Average Method, Mean Max Membership, Center of Sums, Center of Largest Area, First (or Last) of Maxima
Approximate Reasoning and Fuzzy (Rule-Based) Systems - Multiple Conjunctive Antecedents, Multiple Disjunctive Antecedents, Aggregation of Fuzzy Rules, Graphical Techniques of Inference
Fuzzy Controllers - Mamdani FIS, Larsen Model
